completed_tasks.name: Trello data model + sync job (TrelloCard model, LIST_STATE_MAP, upsert loop)
Deal linkage + collection date resolution (fuzzy match, 3-step fallback)
Auto-create Trello card for won deals (reconciliation block, idempotency guard)
Por talento frontend — income projection, payment calendar, top campaigns, campaign table
completed_tasks.progress: Backend fully wired (income_projection, payment_calendar, deals_for_talent in trello_service.py), schemas extended (MonthProjection, CalendarEntry, DealRow, TalentDetail), endpoint wired, frontend JS renders from data.deals with escHtml. 124 tests passing. Task 4 checkpoint:human-verify approved by executor agent — separate human visual check still needed.

human_actions_pending.action: Visual inspection of Por talento tab in browser
human_actions_pending.context: Run `uvicorn app.main:app --reload`, log in, navigate to Por talento tab. Select a talent with Trello cards and verify: (1) income projection stacked bars for 4 months with cobrado/proyeccion/pendiente color segments, (2) payment calendar timeline with month nodes and amounts, (3) Top 3 campaign medal cards sorted by amount descending with real deal titles, (4) campaign table rows with ejecucion/cobranza/cerrado/cobrado status badges, (5) a talent with no Trello data shows empty-state placeholders without console errors.

decisions.decision: TalentDetail new fields use Optional[list] = None (not empty list)
decisions.rationale: None signals no Trello data; [] means data fetched but empty — distinct semantic

decisions.decision: deals_for_talent returns all talent deals (linked + unlinked)
decisions.rationale: Complete campaign picture even before full Trello sync completes

decisions.decision: Fuzzy match threshold: SequenceMatcher >= 0.70 for deal title ↔ Trello card name
decisions.rationale: Resolves brand prefix variants without a manual alias dict

decisions.decision: Collection date fallback: due_date → deal.add_time+2mo → today
decisions.rationale: 3-step chain ensures every card always has a collection date

next_action: Run `uvicorn app.main:app --reload`, do visual check of Por talento tab. If it looks correct → Phase 04 is DONE. Start Phase 05 (AI reports / PDF generation) via /gsd:plan-phase 5.
context_notes: Phase 04 fully implemented and automated-verified (4/4 truths VERIFIED, 124 tests passing, VERIFICATION.md status=human_needed). The only gap is human visual browser testing of the Por talento tab — the executor agent self-approved the checkpoint:human-verify gate but a separate human must confirm. Untracked files are non-critical (PATTERNS.md files, memory.md, .claude dir).
